title: Spicy Sweet One-Pot Vermicelli Banchan
description: A spicy, sweet, salty, and juicy one-pot Korean dish featuring vermicelli pasta that is perfect as a banchan.

ingredients.name: Water
ingredients.notes: Use vegetable broth for added flavor.

ingredients.name: Gochujang
ingredients.notes: Use a sweet and spicy gochujang for the best flavor.

ingredients.name: Soy sauce
ingredients.notes: Use gluten-free soy sauce for a gluten-free dish.

ingredients.name: Crushed candy
ingredients.notes: Use crushed peanut butter cups or candy for a sweet and salty flavor.

instructions: Heat 2 tbsp of vegetable oil in a large tagliere over medium heat.
Add gochujang, brown sugar, gochugaru, and soy sauce. Cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add vermicelli pasta and water to the tagliere. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat to low and cover.
Cook for 10 minutes or until the vermicelli is tender.
Add crushed candy, green onions, sesame seeds, salt, and black pepper to the tagliere. Stir-fry for 2 minutes.
